channel.title: AI 时代观察
channel.description: 以个人成长视角追踪时代脉搏——AI、科技、时事、财经、生活方式，全领域热点一站聚合。扶清闲话 · AI时代观察。

item.title: dzcmemory-web/bazi-ziwei-skill
item.description: 用AI算命的工具，能同时分析八字和紫微斗数，还能生成水墨风格的命盘海报。

item.title: ruvnet/agent-harness-generator
item.description: 🛠️ The meta-harness for AI agents — scaffold your own focused, branded agent harness with its own npx CLI, MCP server, memory, learning loop, and witness-signed releases. Works with Claude Code, Codex, pi.dev, Hermes, OpenClaw, and RVM (hardware-isolated sandbox).

item.title: kingofdwarfs/DeepFake-AI-RealTime
item.description: An advanced, LLM-powered toolkit providing comprehensive capabilities for ethical synthetic media detection, analysis, and responsible content generation.

item.title: ExtarDev/WorpGPT-Latest-2026
item.description: A comprehensive Red Teaming framework for testing Large Language Model (LLM) robustness against adversarial prompt engineering and jailbreak vectors.

item.title: agiwhitelist/tokdiet
item.description: Local streaming reverse proxy between AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) and model APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, MiniMax). Meters every token + USD cost, compacts bloated context to cut pay-per-token API spend, and runs shadow-eval to prove quality held. ccusage-style metering + live local dashboard.

item.title: Sorathiya123/claude-ai-free-desktop-app
item.description: free claude code ai github desktop pc windows linux macOS proxy server anthropic free api local llm router nvidia nim openrouter deepseek ollama lm studio vscode extension jetbrains cli terminal coding assistant

item.title: 科氪 | 两轮电动车没有天花板，爱玛黑翼要用AI与硬核科技赢得年轻男性的心
item.description: 爱玛推出专为年轻男性设计的极速电动车品牌，用AI和硬核科技重新定义两轮电动车。

item.title: 氪星晚报｜BilibiliWorld 2026成国内首个海外售票的综合性ACG展会；让AI走进千家万户，17项举措推进“人工智能+消费”发展；快舟十一号遥十三运载火箭发射成功
item.description: B站2026展会首次卖海外票，政府推出17项措施推动AI走进日常生活。

item.title: 蔚来补上“智驾课”，任少卿总结：智驾技术创新将重构竞争
item.description: 蔚来给不同代的电动车都升级了智能驾驶系统，解决了硬件限制的问题。

item.title: 北大科学家下场做脑机接口，种子轮融了近亿元
item.description: 北大科学家成立的脑机接口公司获得数亿元投资，相关技术已在医疗场景应用。

item.title: 红杉、阿里押注过的具身大脑公司再融资，上交等投资数亿元｜硬氪首发
item.description: 腾讯和年轻团队合作开发AI编程工具，专注提升代码效率。

item.title: 36氪「2026最具价值成长企业100」正式发布
item.description: 美图公司推出八款AI产品，不再让用户苦学PS技巧。

item.title: 中科院博士冲上市，市值超105亿港币
item.description: SpaceX收购Cursor，字节推出更小的AI工具，科技巨头在AI领域动作频频。

item.title: 粉笔科技的人大讲座事件的说明与致歉

item.title: 《国务院关于对外投资的规定》自7月1日起施行
item.description: 国务院新规定从7月1日起管理对外投资，目的是让国家在国际投资中更安全、更有效。

item.title: I put Siri AI through the same tests I use for ChatGPT and Gemini on MacOS 27 - here's how it did
item.description: I tried the new Siri on my Mac, and although it's off to a promising start, Apple still has more work to do.

item.title: KorroAi/drunk-claude
item.description: Drunk Claude : intensity slider (0.1 tipsy to 1.0 blackout), 5 moods, 8 creative techniques. The unfiltered genius skill for Claude Code. MIT.

item.title: WWDC26 在现场，与 Apple 设计大奖提名开发者聊聊他们的 app
item.description: Transformer算法创始人加入OpenAI，可能带来更强大的AI技术。

item.title: AI编程从零开始：环境配置到开发调试
item.description: 用AI编程写Chrome插件非常简单，十分钟就能完成，编程门槛大幅降低。

item.title: Google, Microsoft, and OpenAI Back Linux Foundation's Appia AI Standards Initiative
item.description: BrianFagioli writes: Google, Microsoft, OpenAI, Arm, Mastercard, Siemens, and other companies have joined the newly launched Appia Foundation under the Linux Foundation. The project aims to create common specifications and assessment frameworks that organizations can use to demonstrate AI systems meet emerging safety, trust, and compliance requirements. According to the Linux Foundation, the framework is designed to allow conformity evidence to be reused across the AI supply chain, potentially reducing duplicate assessments and compliance costs. The announcement comes as governments around the world move toward enforcing AI regulations and organizations face increasing pressure to prove AI systems are trustworthy. "As international standards and legal frameworks become more established, global organizations need a consistent, practical way to verify that AI systems conform to new expectations," said Jim Zemlin, CEO of the Linux Foundation. "The Appia Foundation establishes a neutrally

item.title: Rolling out AI agents? 4 ways to move fast and furious - but with extreme caution
item.description: For starters, don't just hand over the keys to AI agents. Any endeavor needs to remain a human-instigated, human-led endeavor.

item.title: majidmanzarpour/threejs-game-skills
item.description: Agent skills for building playable, polished Three.js browser games with gameplay, AAA-style graphics, UI, QA, and optional AI-generated 3D, image, and audio assets.

item.title: nnecrkvenuOX/formcms
item.description: AI Agent: Open-source headless CMS built with ASP.NET Core (C#) and React, featuring REST APIs, GraphQL, and a GrapesJS page designer.

item.description: A plain-language writing skill for AI agents, with a revision view that shows what changed.

item.title: 001TMF/框架工坊
item.description: Turn Claude Code into its own Meta-Harness — a skill that evolves the scaffolding around a fixed model (memory, retrieval, context, prompts) via a native propose→score→Pareto loop. Native reimplementation of Meta-Harness (Lee et al. 2026).

item.title: kerryjanes/ChainKey
item.description: Context-Enriched Multi-Party Transaction Orchestrator leveraging Machine Learning for Scalable, Intelligent Distributed Transaction Manager

item.title: ‘Queer Eye’s’ life coach Karamo Brown launches Kē, a wellness app featuring his AI digital clone
item.description: Karamo Brown, famous for his pep talks on Netflix’s “Queer Eye,” has jumped into the wellness and AI space with his new app, Kē. After spending a year and a half focusing on his own journey—from fitness and nutrition to meditation, sobriety, relationships, and personal growth—Brown wants to help others do the same.  Kē offers […]

item.title: AI Will Lead To Labor Shortages, Bezos Says In Optimistic Talk
item.description:
An anonymous reader quotes a report from Reuters: Artificial Intelligence will lead to labour shortages, not the replacement of humans, Amazon founder Jeff Bezos predicted in a highly optimistic appearance at the VivaTech technology conference in Paris on Wednesday. Bezos put forward a rosy vision of how technology will help humanity, speaking about projects including his space venture Blue Origin and his new AI startup Prometheus, which is aimed at speeding up physical manufacturing. "I know there's a lot of concern that many people have, including many smart people, that AI is going to make humans redundant and so on," Bezos said. "I totally disagree with this point of view. And I think, in fact, AI is going to create a labor shortage."
Half of Americans fear the rise of AI could put them or someone in their household out of work, a Reuters/Ipsos poll found this month. Bezos, the world's fourth-richest person with a net worth around $250 billion, argued that people have "endless" t

item.title: Ukraine hits a Moscow oil refinery and other sites in a large-scale drone attack
item.description: Ukraine launched a new wave of drone attacks on Russia early Thursday, amounting to one of the largest attacks on the Russian capital since the Kremlin ordered the invasion of Ukraine more than four years ago.
